name: SEAD Intro — IADS Probe
description: Small integrated air defence system 60 km ahead: one Early-Warning Radar, two SA-15 Tor SHORADs cueing off it, two ZSU-23-4 Shilka point-defence guns around the command post, and the command post itself. Tactical lesson: the SAMs run silent until the EWR pings you. Strike the EWR and the SAMs are blind; bait their radar on then strike them with anti-radiation munitions. The Shilkas always-radiate but only kill at <3 km — punching through low risks getting shredded by 23 mm tracers. No friendly fighters, no hostile CAP — pure SEAD/strike.
